/usr/bin/ar qc librenderer_core.a CMakeFiles/renderer_core.dir/src/core/framebuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderer_core.dir/src/core/texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderer_core.dir/src/platform/sdl_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderer_core.dir/src/raytracer/scene_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderer_core.dir/src/raytracer/mesh_bvh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderer_core.dir/src/rasterizer/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderer_core.dir/src/rasterizer/rasterizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderer_core.dir/src/raycaster/map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderer_core.dir/src/raycaster/raycaster_engine.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib librenderer_core.a
